name: Airto Moreira
abstract: Airto Guimorvan Moreira (born August 5, 1941) is a Brazilian jazz drummer, composer and percussionist. He is married to jazz singer Flora Purim, and their daughter Diana Moreira is also a singer.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Cannonball Adderley Quintet, Oscar Peterson, and Mahavishnu Orchestra

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Lellis
about_quotes.evidence: the second tune I ever wrote lyrics to was Keith Jarrett’s “Lucky Southern” with Airto Moreira was on it, an Airto album.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Lellis interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, July 31, 2007

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Airto [Moreira] is on it. [INTERVIEWEE] I don’t remember Airto there.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
